title: Dot Gradient 2
description: A dynamic gradient background transitioning from light cyan-blue at the top to deep dark blue at the bottom, creating a vertical color flow. The gradient uses the OKLCH color space for smooth transitions between #00a6ff (bright cyan-blue) and #000dff (deep blue). A sine wave distortion effect with 119-degree angle and 0.33 strength creates subtle undulating ripples across the entire surface, giving the gradient a fluid, organic quality with gentle wave-like perturbations. Overlaid on top is a dot grid pattern with #d8fa2d (bright yellow-green) dots at 30% density with 0.04 size, creating a starfield or particle effect. These dots use a linear dodge blend mode, causing them to appear luminous and glowing against the blue gradient background. The dots have a twinkle animation effect set to full intensity, making them shimmer and pulse subtly. The overall atmosphere is serene and cosmic, resembling a night sky or deep water environment with twinkling stars or bioluminescent particles. The wave distortion adds gentle movement and fluidity while maintaining the calm, meditative quality of the composition.
